title: FCA Financial Services Register
short_description: Public record of all FCA-authorised firms and individuals in the UK financial services sector.
long_description: The Financial Services Register is the FCA's public record of authorised and regulated firms and individuals. It contains registration status, permissions, contact details and key personnel. Used by consumers, compliance teams and fintechs to verify firm authorisation. Data spans 50+ years. Updated daily. Bulk extracts available via the Register Extract Service (commercial licence).
format: Web search; CSV/XML via bulk extract
access_method: Free web search; bulk extract requires commercial licence
schema_fields: firm_reference_number|string|Unique FCA reference;firm_name|string|Registered name;status|string|Authorised/Cancelled/Suspended;address|string|Principal place of business;permissions|string|Regulated activities permitted
sample_rows: 123456|Barclays Bank PLC|Authorised|1 Churchill Place London E14 5HP|Accepting deposits,Issuing e-money
notes: Bulk extract (Register Extract Service) requires commercial licence via Spectrum Data Management. Free web search available. High priority for fintech and compliance use cases.

title: FCA Financial Instruments Reference Data (FIRDS)
short_description: Reference data for all financial instruments traded on UK venues, including ISINs, LEI codes and instrument classifications.
long_description: FIRDS contains instrument reference data for all traded instruments on UK trading venues. Covers ISIN codes, LEI codes, instrument names, trading venue identifiers, and MiFID II classification data. Full and delta files published daily by 9am UTC. Essential for trade reporting, compliance, and market surveillance. ~5 million instrument records.
schema_fields: isin|string|International Securities Identification Number;instrument_full_name|string|Full name of instrument;trading_venue_id|string|MIC code of trading venue;cfi_code|string|Classification of Financial Instruments;lei|string|Legal Entity Identifier of issuer
notes: Critical for financial data infrastructure. Full file plus daily delta files available.

title: FCA Mortgage Lending Statistics
short_description: Quarterly residential mortgage lending data including advances, loan-to-value ratios and borrower risk profiles.
long_description: Published quarterly by the FCA, this dataset covers residential mortgage advances, outstanding balances, borrower income multiples, loan-to-value bands, repayment types and arrears. Covers all FCA-regulated mortgage lenders. Used by property analysts, economists and policymakers. Data from Q1 2007 to present.
schema_fields: quarter|date|Reporting quarter;gross_advances_count|integer|Number of new mortgage advances;gross_advances_value_gbp|float|Value of new advances in GBP;ltv_band|string|Loan-to-value band;borrower_type|string|First-time buyer/home mover/remortgage
notes: Strong signal for London housing market analysis. Borough-level breakdowns not available but UK regional data included.

title: Ofcom Connected Nations Report Data
short_description: UK broadband and mobile network coverage maps with speeds and availability by geography.
long_description: Annual and interim Connected Nations reports provide detailed broadband and mobile network coverage data for the UK. Includes fixed broadband availability by technology (FTTP, DOCSIS, ADSL), average download/upload speeds, 4G and 5G outdoor coverage by operator. Data at postcode level in shapefiles. Used by ISPs, local authorities and Ofcom for coverage gap analysis.
schema_fields: postcode|string|Unit postcode;fttp_availability|boolean|Full fibre to premises available;avg_download_speed_mbps|float|Average download speed;4g_coverage|boolean|4G outdoor coverage;5g_coverage|boolean|5G outdoor coverage
notes: Postcode-level data. Strong use case for digital infrastructure analysis across London boroughs.

title: Ofcom Telecoms and Pay-TV Complaints
short_description: Quarterly complaints data against major UK telecoms and pay-TV providers per 100,000 subscribers.
long_description: Ofcom publishes quarterly complaints data showing complaint volumes per 100,000 customers for the largest telecoms and pay-TV providers, covering broadband, landline, mobile and pay-TV services. Allows comparison of provider performance. Data published since May 2015.

title: Ofcom UK Spectrum Awards
short_description: Complete spectrum allocation data showing who holds licences across the UK's radio frequency spectrum.
long_description: Dataset of all spectrum awards and licences across the UK radio frequency spectrum from 8.3kHz to 275GHz. Powers the Ofcom Interactive Spectrum Map. Contains licence holder, frequency band, geographic area and award date. Useful for telecoms infrastructure planning and spectrum analysis.
schema_fields: licence_id|string|Ofcom licence identifier;licence_holder|string|Name of licence holder;frequency_from_mhz|float|Lower frequency bound;frequency_to_mhz|float|Upper frequency bound;geographic_area|string|Coverage area

title: ORR Passenger Rail Performance Statistics
short_description: Quarterly punctuality, reliability and delay statistics for mainline passenger train operators in Great Britain.
long_description: The ORR Data Portal publishes quarterly and 4-weekly rail performance statistics covering percentage of trains on time, cancellations, and delay minutes by cause. Data available by operator, line, and individual station. Covers all mainline passenger franchises. Used by rail operators, DfT and passengers to assess service quality.
schema_fields: period|date|Reporting period;operator|string|Train operating company;punctuality_pct|float|% trains on time;cancellations_pct|float|% trains cancelled;delay_minutes|integer|Total delay minutes attributed
notes: Includes Elizabeth line, Overground, Thameslink — key for London transport analysis.

title: ORR Estimates of Station Usage
short_description: Annual passenger journey estimates for every railway station in Great Britain.
long_description: Annual estimates of the number of passengers entering and exiting at every station on the national rail network in Great Britain. Based on ticket sales and survey data. Covers approximately 2,600 stations including all London terminals and commuter stations. Data published by ORR from ticket machine and barrier counts.
schema_fields: station_name|string|Name of railway station;station_code|string|3-letter CRS code;entries|integer|Passenger entries per year;exits|integer|Passenger exits per year;interchange|integer|Interchange journeys

title: CAA UK Airport Statistics
short_description: Monthly and annual passenger, freight and aircraft movement statistics for 60+ UK airports.
long_description: The CAA publishes comprehensive aviation statistics for all UK airports with scheduled services. Covers passenger numbers by route, terminal and airline, aircraft movements, cargo tonnage and mail volumes. Data for Heathrow, Gatwick, Stansted, Luton and City Airport of particular relevance for London. Monthly data published with ~4-week lag.
schema_fields: airport|string|Airport name;month|date|Reporting month;pax_terminal|integer|Terminal passengers;pax_transit|integer|Transit passengers;cargo_tonnes|float|Total freight tonnes;atm_commercial|integer|Commercial aircraft movements

title: CQC Care Directory with Ratings
short_description: Monthly download of all CQC-regulated care services in England with their latest inspection ratings.
long_description: Complete directory of all health and social care services registered with the Care Quality Commission in England. Includes hospitals, care homes, GP practices, dental practices, home care agencies, hospices and more. Each record contains the latest CQC rating across five domains (Safe, Effective, Caring, Responsive, Well-led), location address, provider details and regulated activities. ~60,000 active locations.
schema_fields: location_id|string|CQC location ID;location_name|string|Service name;postcode|string|Location postcode;location_type|string|Care home/Hospital/GP etc;overall_rating|string|Outstanding/Good/Requires Improvement/Inadequate
notes: Filter by postcode for London coverage. API also available — daily updates.

title: CQC Care Provider API
short_description: REST API providing daily-updated data on all CQC-registered care providers and locations in England.
long_description: Programmatic access to the full CQC care services database via REST API. Endpoints for providers, locations, inspection reports and ratings. Updated daily, same frequency as the CQC website. Returns JSON with full provider and location metadata including contact details, regulated activities, registered managers and inspection history.
schema_fields: locationId|string|Unique location identifier;locationName|string|Service name;postalCode|string|Postcode;overallRating|string|Latest overall rating;lastInspectionDate|date|Date of most recent inspection

title: Ofsted Five-Year Inspection Data
short_description: Five-year rolling dataset of Ofsted inspection outcomes for schools, early years, FE and children's social care.
long_description: Official Ofsted statistics covering inspection outcomes over a rolling five-year period for all regulated providers: state-funded schools, independent schools, early years providers, further education colleges, children's social care and initial teacher education providers. Provider-level and inspection-level files. Includes Ofsted reference number, provider name, address, type, and outcome grades.
schema_fields: urn|string|Unique Reference Number;establishment_name|string|School or provider name;postcode|string|Location postcode;phase_of_education|string|Primary/Secondary/All-through;overall_effectiveness|integer|1=Outstanding to 4=Inadequate

title: ICO Register of Data Protection Fee Payers
short_description: Downloadable register of all UK organisations registered as data controllers under GDPR/Data Protection Act 2018.
long_description: Complete CSV download of all organisations registered with the Information Commissioner's Office as data controllers. Contains organisation name, trading names, data protection officer contact details, registration number, tier and expiry date. Over 1 million registered organisations. Updated daily. Searchable via the ICO website and available as a full download.
schema_fields: registration_number|string|ICO registration number;organisation_name|string|Registered organisation name;trading_names|string|Trading name(s) if different;address|string|Registered address;dpo_email|string|DPO email if provided
sample_rows: ZA123456|Acme Ltd|Acme Trading|1 High Street London EC1A 1BB|dpo@acme.com

title: Environment Agency Flood Map for Planning
short_description: Flood risk zone shapefiles for England showing areas at risk from rivers, sea and surface water flooding.
long_description: The EA Flood Map for Planning provides the definitive spatial dataset of flood risk zones used in planning decisions across England. Zones 1 (low risk), 2 (medium risk), 3a (high risk) and 3b (functional floodplain) based on modelled flood extents. Updated as new modelling is completed. The National Flood Risk Assessment 2 (NaFRA2) major update was released December 2024.
schema_fields: zone|string|Flood risk zone (1/2/3a/3b);area_sqm|float|Area of polygon in sq metres;waterbody|string|Associated waterbody name;model_date|date|Date of flood model used
notes: Critical for property, insurance and planning use cases. High commercial value.

title: Environment Agency Real-Time Flood Monitoring API
short_description: Real-time 15-minute flood monitoring data from ~3,500 river gauging and tidal stations across England.
long_description: The Environment Agency Flood Monitoring API provides access to near real-time readings from river level, tidal, rainfall and groundwater monitoring stations. ~3,500 stations with readings every 15 minutes. JSON API with endpoints for stations, measures and readings. Includes Thames tidal stations, River Lea gauges and London-area rainfall gauges. Essential for flood early warning systems.
schema_fields: station_id|string|Station reference;river_name|string|Associated river or waterbody;lat|float|Latitude;lon|float|Longitude;latest_reading|float|Most recent level reading in metres

title: HSE Register of Enforcement Notices
short_description: Rolling 5-year register of improvement and prohibition notices issued by HSE to UK workplaces.
long_description: The HSE Public Register of Enforcement Notices contains all active enforcement notices (improvement notices, prohibition notices and deferred prohibition notices) issued under health and safety legislation. Rolling 5-year window with ~9-week delay for appeals. Searchable online and exportable. Includes notified entity name, address, inspector ID, legislation cited and notice date.
access_method: Free web search and CSV export
schema_fields: notice_number|string|Unique notice reference;recipient_name|string|Name of notified employer;recipient_address|string|Business address;notice_type|string|Improvement/Prohibition;legislation|string|Act/regulation cited
sample_rows: 1234567|Acme Construction Ltd|10 Industrial Road London E1 2AB|Prohibition|Health and Safety at Work Act 1974 s21
